item.title: Pemex chief executive resigns, financial director appointed to role
item.description: Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum made official announcement on social media video

item.title: US LNG project gets $9.75 billion green light for construction
item.description: Caturus-led Commonwealth LNG reaches final investment decision

item.title: Iraq appoints industry veteran as new oil minister
item.description: Bassim Mohammed Khudair is a career oil sector manager with long in-field experience

item.title: Japan's Inpex makes major LNG play in Australia
item.description: Agreement signed to gain stake in Australia's largest undeveloped field

item.title: Contracting giant says gas is anchor of global energy system
item.description: Gas and LNG are a priority growth market for Worley

item.title: Contracting giant Worley says gas is anchor of global energy system
item.description: Gas and LNG are a priority growth market for Worley

item.title: ABS inks MoU with South Korean heavyweight
item.description: ABS and HD Hyundai Heavy Industries to collaborate on operational resilience in the offshore sector

item.title: This week's leading oil and gas appointments
French contractor wins Malaysia floater prize
item.description: GTT will design tanks for Petronas’ LNG FSRU

item.title: Chinese contractor scoops Petronas FPSO EPC job
item.description: OceanStar Elite awards engineering, procurement and construction prize for newbuild floater

item.title: Texas gets windfall from Middle East crisis
item.description: Companies are enjoying the unexpected lift but show little inclination to move quickly toward higher production

item.title: ExxonMobil resumes drilling in Guyana block after four-year-plus hiatus
item.description: Company drilled Bulletwood-1, Jabillo-1 and Sapote-1 wells in 2021

item.title: US says China interested in buying more of its oil
item.description: China stopped importing US crude and LNG in 2025, China's customs data shows

item.title: Petrobras eyes Pemex partnership for ‘unexplored’ Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Companies assessing potential collaboration in oil, biodiesel, exploration and refining

item.title: Chevron nails Equatorial Guinea exploration deal
item.description: Supermajor agrees reconnaissance licence for five offshore blocks

item.title: BP farms into Uzbekistan exploration blocks
item.description: Farm-in aims to explore six blocks in North Ustyurt region of Central Asian country

item.title: US set to become Europe’s largest LNG supplier in 2026
item.description: Russia holding in number two slot despite ongoing European Union phase-outs

item.title: Eni in early talks to raise funds from private equity players: Report
item.description: Reuters says Italian major has asked Morgan Stanley to support financing initiative

item.title: European FPSO player marks financing milestone
item.description: Bluewater has new 12-year fixed FPSO contract to prepare for

item.title: Contractor eyes EPC deal for Qatar LNG mega-trains damaged by Iran attack
item.description: The attacks damaged two liquefaction trains — Train 4 and Train 6 — with combined production capacity of 12.8 million tonnes per annum

item.title: Inpex lifts annual outlook amid macroeconomic environment
item.description: Elevated oil prices expected to propel the Japanese major’s full-year profits, although effects not felt in first quarter

item.title: Pharos advances in Vietnam with successful appraisal well
item.description: Successful offshore campaign could increase Pharos’ production volumes

item.title: UK company advances in Vietnam with successful appraisal well
item.description: Successful offshore campaign could increase Pharos’ production volumes

item.title: Observers question the financial viability of Australia’s next mega-development
item.description: Latest Woodside-commissioned report adds more than $10 billion to Browse investment costs estimates versus previous forecast

item.title: FID in sight for PTTEP's fast-track offshore gas project
item.description: Valeura Energy farming into two prospective assets offshore Thailand

item.title: Namibia onshore well test set to begin within weeks
item.description: Critical operations a step nearer on ReconAfrica's onshore Kavango West-1X exploration well

item.title: Petrobras plans to boost production capacity at eighth Buzios FPSO
item.description: P-79 FPSO started operations in Santos basin pre-salt field earlier this month

item.title: Opec and IEA publish conflicting views on oil demand destruction
item.description: Opec's optimistic demand outlook is rejected by IEA while both warn of accelerating stockpile draws

item.title: Petrobras approaching target reservoir in closely-watched Morpho well
item.description: Company has another eight wells to drill in Brazil's northern equatorial margin

item.title: TotalEnergies and Chevron to drill key Nigeria exploration and appraisal wells
item.description: Akpo Far East is exploration target while Egina South and Ikija discoveries will be appraised, as Preowei studies continue
